summary: Every-minute SPY heuristic signal job (bullish/bearish/bull_trap/bear_trap/neutral) over 5/10/20 min, persisted to spy_signals; latest/history/run endpoints; in-process asyncio job in lifespan; /signals UI with color-coded badges, history, run-now, auto-refresh, and a not-advice disclaimer. Engine is pure/deterministic. Verified live: job started, run produced a signal (neutral after-hours, flat series — correct), history accumulates, page renders. 20 new tests incl. all 4 directional labels via synthetic series. Full suite 308 passed (2 pre-existing Alpaca failures). ruff + strict mypy + eslint + tsc + mandate green. No trade execution.
